text.title: Agent Context Engineering Corpus Standard Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the agent-context-engineering-corpus-standard methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-and-classify-sources
step.action: Classify each source by class (auth doc, ticket, code, chat) and freshness tier.

step.name: define-chunking-and-embedding
step.action: Pick chunking strategy + embedding model; pin versions.

step.name: define-ranking-and-freshness
step.action: Set ranker + tie-break; freshness cap per source class.

step.name: define-citation-and-redaction
step.action: Citation format + redaction rules for PII; refusal when policy violated.
step.decision-gate: If PII redaction is incomplete, BLOCK corpus deployment.
